mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort_order FROM departments WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM departments WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (name, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET name = #{name}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE departments SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
